data.title: Pony.ai launches 24/7 Robotaxi in Guangzhou and Shenzhen, key cities in China, boosting autonomous transportation.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on July 25, 2025, Pony.ai (NASDAQ: PONY) announced the initiation of continuous Robotaxi services in the bustling Chinese cities of Guangzhou and Shenzhen, important economic hubs in southern China. This strategic step signifies the company's commitment to autonomy, aiming to provide 24/7 autonomous transportation services in these regions.

data.title: Booz Allen Hamilton to report Q1 earnings on July 25, expected EPS of $1.45 (up from $1.38) and revenue of $2.95 billion (up from $2.94 billion). Shares fell 0.7% to close at $115.12.
data.description: Booz Allen Hamilton Holding Corporation (NYSE: BAH) is scheduled to report its first-quarter earnings on Friday, July 25, before the market opens. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $1.45 per share, an increase from the $1.38 per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $2.95 billion, up slightly from $2.94 billion in the previous year. Recently, the company secured a $315 million contract to enhance the command and control systems for the U.S. Air Force. Despite this positive news, Booz Allen Hamilton shares experienced a 0.7% decrease, closing at $115.12 on Thursday. For more in-depth analysis, interested readers can find additional information on the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

data.title: Billionaire Ray Dalio warns of impending 'economic heart attack' due to rising national debt. Urges fiscal discipline akin to 1990s to avoid crisis as U.S. debt nears $37 trillion and deficit grows. Warns of debt service payments impacting buying power. Calls for unity to avoid systemic breakdown.
data.description: Billionaire Ray Dalio issued a dire warning, comparing the U.S. national debt crisis to an impending "economic heart attack." The national debt is nearing $37 trillion, with the federal deficit continuing to rise. Dalio stated that the U.S. is spending 40% more than it's taking in, leading to a chronic problem. He warned that increasing debt payments could restrict buying power, potentially leading to a point where new debt is issued just to cover interest. Dalio urged policymakers to return to fiscal discipline like in the 1990s to avoid a systemic breakdown. He believes unity and determination, as seen in the 1991-1998 period, could provide a solution. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Envision Energy launches first green marine ammonia bunkering, powered by green ammonia from largest plant in Chifeng.
data.description: Envision Energy, a prominent figure in sustainable technology based in DALIAN, China, revealed on July 25, 2025, that they have achieved a significant milestone. The company's monumental accomplishment involves utilizing green ammonia fuel, sourced from the largest green hydrogen and ammonia facility in Chifeng. This breakthrough has led to the successful operation of the world's premier green marine ammonia vessel. These strides mark a pivotal moment for the industry, highlighting the possibilities within eco-friendly energy production.

data.title: PHNIX unveils global brand upgrade and two flagship products at summit in Guangzhou, China on July 25, 2025.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on July 25, 2025, PHNIX introduced its enhanced global brand strategy at the PHNIX Global Brand Summit. The summit brought together international distributors, industry experts, and media representatives to observe the company's latest initiatives.

data.title: Raythink releases IX2 AIR Pro Wireless Thermal Camera with 30m image transmission, AI super-resolution, and 512×384 resolution.
data.description: Raythink Technology Co., Ltd., a leading player in the thermal imaging sector based in Yantai, China, revealed on July 25, 2025, the launch of the IX2 AIR Pro Wireless Thermal Camera for Smartphone. Priced affordably, this cutting-edge camera provides users with 512x384 AI-super-resolution, catering to a growing demand for high-quality thermal imaging technology.

data.title: Humanoid robot industry chain matchmaking event in Beijing at 3rd CISCE, focused on innovation and productive forces.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Beijing hosted the Hubei Humanoid Robotics Industry Chain Matchmaking Conference as part of the 3rd China International Supply Chain Expo (CISCE). The event centered around the theme of "Synergizing Cutting-Edge Innovations, Empowering New Quality Productive Forces." The conference brought together key players in the industry to explore collaborations and foster advancements in humanoid robotics. Key highlights included discussions on the latest technological developments, market trends, and investment opportunities. The event saw participation from over 500 industry professionals, including researchers, manufacturers, and investors.

data.title: Deepcoin partners with Upbit Singapore for secure transfers, approved as a VASP. Key details announced on July 25, 2025.
data.description: In a recent update on July 25, 2025, Deepcoin, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency exchange, revealed a significant collaboration with Upbit Singapore. This partnership led to Deepcoin being included in Upbit Singapore's roster of approved Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASP). Upbit Singapore, recognized as one of Asia's top regulated exchanges, has thus expanded its network by incorporating Deepcoin's services into its platform, bolstering their efforts in the cryptocurrency realm.

data.title: Wall Street analysts revise HCA Healthcare Q2 expectations, with an anticipated $6.32 EPS and $18.5B revenue. Company's stock dropped 3.3% to close at $341.48 before earnings report.
data.description: Healthcare company HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings on July 25. Analysts anticipate earnings of $6.32 per share, a rise from $5.50 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $18.5 billion, up from $17.49 billion last year. Recently, John W. Chidsey, III was appointed as an Independent Director of HCA Healthcare. The company's stock closed at $341.48 on Thursday, showing a 3.3% decrease. For more information on analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Centene (NYSE: CNC) to release Q2 earnings expecting $0.23/share, down from $2.42 yr-ago, $44.2 billion revenue projection. Stock price dropped 9% to $26.76 before earnings release.
data.description: On July 25, Centene Corporation (CNC) is set to report its second-quarter earnings before the market opens. Analysts predict earnings of 23 cents per share, a decline from $2.42 per share in the same period last year. Revenue is expected to be $44.2 billion, up from $39.84 billion a year ago. Centene recently retracted its 2025 GAAP and adjusted diluted EPS guidance. Following this news, Centene's stock price dropped by 9% to close at $26.76 on Thursday. For more details and to check the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.
